changes_made: Extracted duplicated TOKEN_WARNING constant from 6 command files into shared src/cli/utils/command-helpers.ts
Extracted duplicated error handling catch block pattern into shared handleCommandError() function in command-helpers.ts
Fixed bug in send.ts: invalid agent error message was showing ALLOWED_DURATIONS instead of CLI_TOOL_IDS
Removed unused imports (ApiError, ExitCode) from command files where no longer needed after refactoring
Added tests for command-helpers.ts (TOKEN_WARNING constant, handleCommandError for ApiError/Error/non-Error/null)
Added test for send command agent validation error message correctness
refactorings_applied: DRY: Extract TOKEN_WARNING constant to shared module (6 duplicates removed)
DRY: Extract handleCommandError() to shared module (6 duplicated catch blocks reduced to 1-line calls)
Bug fix: send.ts invalid agent error message now correctly shows CLI_TOOL_IDS instead of ALLOWED_DURATIONS
Clean imports: Removed unused ApiError and ExitCode imports from files that no longer reference them directly
message: Refactoring complete. Extracted shared TOKEN_WARNING and handleCommandError() to eliminate code duplication across 6 CLI command files. Fixed bug in send.ts agent validation error message. Added 6 new tests.
